content.full_text:
December 6, 1990

John W. Wallace  
Counsel, Legal Division  
California Fair Political Practices Commission  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Mr. Wallace;

Please refer to your file no. I-90-384. I am leaving the Ramona Municipal Water Board December seventh at one o’clock P.M. I need to know the effect of the Fair Political Practices Act on my activities after I leave office. Under threat of condemnation I have given the District permission to enter and build a water storage facility on my property in 1990. I have received no remuneration for the use of my property to date. Please respond as quickly as possible since I need to close the sale of my property to the District in this tax year.

There is a possibility I will be contesting District’s action concerning my property adjacent to the property the District is purchasing from me. Will my efforts be restricted in any way by the Fair Political Practices Act?

Sincerely,

Jack Allen  
16611 Highland Valley Rd.  
Ramona, CA
